channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google Meet disponible sur CarPlay, les utilisateurs Android devront attendre
item.description: Google vient de déployer Google Meet sur Apple CarPlay, cela permet enfin de rejoindre vos réunions pro directement depuis l'écran de votre voiture.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and up to 50% off for existing customers.

item.title: HelloFresh Coupon Codes: 55% Off + Free Meals
item.description: Get up to 55% off and free meal boxes using a HelloFresh coupon code today. Discover our best codes and discounts to let you save time and money.

item.title: Booking.com Promo Codes and Deals: Up to 20% Off
item.description: Enjoy big savings on your next adventure with our Booking.com coupons and handpicked travel deals.

item.title: $20 Chewy Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Explore Chewy coupon codes for $30 off, $20 off your first order $49, 50% off pet food, and more April 2026 discounts.

item.title: 50% Off Home Depot Promo Codes | April 2026
item.description: Save up to 50% today with the latest Home Depot promo codes for appliances, power tools, and more this April.

item.title: Castlery Promo Code: Save Up to 15% in April 2026
item.description: Refresh your living space for less with these verified Castlery coupons, including free shipping offers and furniture set discounts.

item.title: 30% Off Skullcandy Coupon Codes | April 2026
item.description: Save on today’s top Skullcandy Promo Codes for Crusher Evo headphones, 36% off Crusher ANC 2 noise-canceling headphones, and more with amazing deals.

item.title: 30% Off Samsung Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Save 30% or 10% with Samsung coupon codes, up to $1,000 on appliances, plus limited-time deals on the Galaxy Z Fold7, Flip7, and S25.

item.title: 25% Off Dyson Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Get 25% off with a Dyson coupon code, plus save up to $600 with discounts on vacuums, $150 off Airwraps, and more.

item.title: Artemis II : pour filmer la lune, voici le matériel utilisé par la NASA
item.description: On s'imagine souvent des caméras futuristes et secrètes... Pour Artemis II, la NASA mélange des boîtiers pro de 2016, des GoPro et, pour la première fois, les smartphones personnels des astronautes

item.title: La passion automobile survit difficilement à la voiture électrique selon Sylvain Lyve, voici pourquoi il se trompe
item.description: On connaît tous Sylvain Lyve pour son amour immodéré des pneus qui fument et des moteurs qui hurlent. Alors, quand il s'attaque au sujet de la voiture électrique, on s'attendait à un massacre en règle. La réalité...

item.title: Google is pushing AI video into ordinary life — just as OpenAI pulls Sora back
item.description: Google has launched its AI Plus subscription in 35 countries, including the U.S., bundling enhanced AI tools, cloud storage, and video generation features.
